name: Ring of Animal Influence
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Allows casting Animal Friendship, Fear, or Speak with Animals.

name: Ring of Djinni Summoning
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Summon a djinni for up to 1 hour.

name: Ring of Elemental Command
stat_impact: Permanent: Advantage on attack rolls against elementals of the linked plane. Linked plane-specific resistances or movements become permanent after certain conditions.

name: Ring of Evasion
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Expend charges to succeed on failed Dexterity saving throws.

name: Ring of Feather Falling
stat_impact: Permanent: Automatically grants the effect of Feather Fall when falling.

name: Ring of Free Action
stat_impact: Permanent: Difficult terrain doesn't cost extra movement. Magic cannot reduce speed or cause paralysis/restraint.

name: Ring of Invisibility
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Use an action to become invisible at will.

name: Ring of Jumping
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Cast the Jump spell as a bonus action at will.

name: Ring of Mind Shielding
stat_impact: Permanent: Immune to magic that allows others to read your thoughts, alignment, or creature type.

name: Ring of Protection
stat_impact: Permanent: +1 bonus to AC and Saving Throws.

name: Ring of Regeneration
stat_impact: Permanent: Regain 1d6 hit points every 10 minutes.

name: Ring of Resistance
stat_impact: Permanent: Resistance to one specific damage type (Acid, Cold, Fire, Force, Lightning, Necrotic, Poison, Psychic, Radiant, or Thunder).

name: Ring of Shooting Stars
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Cast Dancing Lights, Light, Faerie Fire, or other unique effects.

name: Ring of Spell Storing
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Stores up to 5 levels worth of spells cast into it by anyone.

name: Ring of Spell Turning
stat_impact: Permanent: Advantage on saving throws against any spell that targets only you. Can potentially reflect spells on a Nat 20.

name: Ring of Swimming
stat_impact: Permanent: Grants a swimming speed of 40 feet.

name: Ring of Telekinesis
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Cast Telekinesis at will.

name: Ring of Three Wishes
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Use charges to cast the Wish spell.

name: Ring of Warmth
stat_impact: Permanent: Resistance to Cold damage. Tolerates temperatures as low as -50 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Ring of Water Walking
stat_impact: Permanent: Can stand on and move across any liquid surface as if it were solid ground.

name: Ring of X-ray Vision
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. See through solid matter out to 30 feet.

name: Ring of the Ram
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Use charges to make a spectral ram attack or break objects.

name: Ring of Temporal Salvation
stat_impact: Permanent: If you die, the ring teleports you to where you were 1 round ago and restores you to 3d6 + Constitution modifier hit points (single use).

name: Ring of Shared Suffering
stat_impact: Permanent: Reaction to grant an ally resistance to damage from one attack, taking the same amount of damage yourself.
source: Critical Role: Call of the Netherdeep
